narrative:
Mohawk (precinct in Carroll County) has 1,098 registered voters, with 48.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.9 percentage points.
